account_id.description: The unique identifier of the account. You find this information on [the Yuno dashboard](https://dashboard.y.uno/) (UUID, 36 chars.).

merchant_reference.description: The unique identifier of the merchant's payout (MAX 255; MIN 3).

description.description: The description of the payout (MAX 255; MIN 3).

country.description: Country where the transaction must be processed (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](country-reference)).

purpose.description: Indicates the purpose for the payout. Possible enum values: Check the Purpose list.

amount.description: Specifies the payout amount object, with the value and currency.

currency.description: The currency used to make the payout (MAX 3; MIN 3; [ISO 4217](country-code)) .

beneficiary.description: Specifies the beneficiary object with their identification.

merchant_beneficiary_id.description: Unique identifier of the recipient defined by the merchant (MAX 255; MIN 1).

national_entity.description: Beneficiary's national entity type. Individual by default

legal_name.description: Beneficiary's name (MAX 80). Only necessary when national entity is ENTITY.

date_of_birth.description: The beneficiary's date of birth in the YYYY-MM-DD format (MAX 10; MIN 10).

country_code.description: The country calling code of the phone (MAX 3; MIN 1).  Check the [Country reference](country-reference) to see the phone codes.

number.description: The phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1).

city.description: The city considered for the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

state.description: The state/province from the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

zip_code.description: The zipcode for the address (MAX 11; MIN 4).

withdrawal_method.description: The withdrawal method to make the payout.

provider_id.description: The provider to process the payouts with

vaulted_token.description: The vaulted token for a previously stored payment_method. If a payment is created using a vaulted_token (MAX: 64; MIN: 36).

original_transaction_id.description: Id of the referenced payment transaction. Only for payouts to CARD. (MAX 64; MIN 36)

original_payment_id.description: The id of the referenced payment (UUID; 36 chars.).

on_hold.description: Defines if the merchant wants to hold the payout and sets it to be processed later using the Release payout endpoint.

detail.description: Withdrawal method details. Only the object corresponding to the withdrawal method type is necessary.

bank_transfer.description: Bank transfer details to make the payout.

code.description: The beneficiary's specific financial institution code (MAX 8).

branch.description: The beneficiary's specific financial institution branch (MAX 8).

branch_digit.description: The beneficiary's specific financial institution branch digit (MAX 2).

account.description: Beneficiary's financial institution account number or financial institution account alias, such as Clabe for MX (MAX 255; MIN 3).

number.description: Beneficiary's bank account number or bank account alias, such as Clabe for MX (MAX 250; MIN 3)

city.description: The city considered for the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

state.description: The state/province from the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

zip_code.description: The zipcode for the address (MAX 11; MIN 4).

wallet.description: Wallet details to make the withdrawal.

code.description: Beneficiary's wallet account identification code (MAX 3; MIN 250)

document.description: Wallet's owner national document associated to the withdrawal account.

phone.description: Wallet's owner phone associated to the withdrawal account.

country_code.description: The country calling code of the phone (MAX 3; MIN 1).  Check the [Country reference](country-reference) to see the phone codes.

number.description: The phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1).

metadata.description: Specifies a list of metadata objects. You can add up to 50 metadata objects.

status_detail.example: Errors. amount :: must be greater than 0
Batch Status: PENDING, Item Status: PENDING

parameters.name: merchant_reference
parameters.description: Identification of the payout defined by the merchant.

parameters.name: payout_code
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the payout (UUID; 36 chars).

parameters.name: X-Organization-Code
parameters.description: Organization code associated to the request.

type.description: The type of the report to run (MAX 255; MIN 3).

user_code.description: The user identifier to associate with the report request.

start_date.description: Starting timestamp of data to be included in the report run (MAX 24; MIN 24; [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)).

end_date.description: Ending timestamp of data to be included in the report run (MAX 24; MIN 24; [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)).

merchant_reference_id.description: The unique identifier of the report at the merchant side (MAX 255; MIN 3).

account_id.description:
Account identifier(s). Omit to include all accounts. For multiple accounts, send a comma-separated list.
Example: `19d28762-c714-4fb0-9ef6-4e1953ed33tf, 91d82267-c714-4fb0-9ef6-4e1953ed33tf`.

payment_status.description:
The status of the payment (MAX 255; MIN 3; [Payment status](ref:payment#payments-status)). Don't send this parameter to request the creation of a report for all payment status. Otherwise, indicate all the status you want to include.
Example: `CREATED,READY_TO_PAY,DECLINED`

payment_sub_status.description:
The substatus of the payment (MAX 255; MIN 3; [Payment substatus](ref:payment#payments-status)). Don't send this parameter to request the creation of a report for all payment sub status. Otherwise, indicate all the sub status you want to include.
Example: `READY_TO_PAY,PENDING_FRAUD_REVIEW,EXPIRED`

payment_method.description:
The type of payment method selected by the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3; [Payment methods](ref:payment-type-list)). Don't send this parameter to request the creation of a report for all payment methods. Otherwise, indicate all the methods you want to include.
Example: `ADDI,ACUOTAZ,PIX`

currency.description:
The currency used to make the payment (MAX 3; MIN 3; [ISO 4217](ref:country-reference)). Don't send this parameter to request the creation of a report for all currencies. Otherwise, indicate all currencies you want to include.
Example: `ARS,BRL,COP`

country.description:
The country where the transaction must be processed (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](ref:country-reference)). Don't send this parameter to request the creation of a report for all countries. Otherwise, indicate all countries you want to include.
Example: `AR,BR,CO`

transaction_type.description:
The transaction type (MAX 255; MIN 3; [Transaction types](ref:transaction#types-of-transactions)). Don't send this parameter to request the creation of a report for all transaction types. Otherwise, indicate all transaction types you want to include.
Example: `PURCHASE,REFUND,VERIFY`

transaction_status.description:
The status of the transaction (MAX 255; MIN 3; [Transaction status](ref:payment#payments-status)). Don't send this parameter to request the creation of a report for all transaction status. Otherwise, indicate all transaction status you want to include.
Example: `SUCCEEDED,CREATED,EXPIRED`

updated_at_start.description: Starting timestamp of data to be included in the report run by updated date of operation (MAX 27; MIN 27; [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)).

updated_at_end.description: Ending timestamp of data to be included in the report run by updated date of operation (MAX 27; MIN 27; [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)).

columns.description:
Columns to include (only for Payment or Transaction reports). See available fields in [Report Fields](ref:reports-fields).
Example: `account_code,amount_value,card_category`

metadata_fields.description: Columns to include (only if the merchant is exporting metadata fields). This option is exclusive to Transaction and Settlement reports.

items.example: The merchant has no authorization to use this API.
